case_title: MC CARTHY,DENIS DBA S.F. HARDWOOD FLOOR CO VS LISA SWERDLOW CONSTRUCTION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY MC CARTHY,DENIS DBA S.F. HARDWOOD FLOOR CO AS TO DEFENDANT LISA SWERDLOW CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-12-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
